tools.name: get_pipeline_status
tools.description: Get the high-level business status and summary of a pipeline run.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

tools.name: get_pipeline_steps
tools.description: Get the detailed timeline and status of individual steps in a pipeline run.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

tools.name: get_artifacts
tools.description: Get a list of customer-visible artifacts (documents, results) generated by the pipeline run.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

tools.name: explain_error
tools.description: Get a friendly, non-technical explanation of why a pipeline run failed.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Get the estimated total cost of a pipeline run.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

tools.name: request_human_review
tools.description: Request a human expert to review the pipeline run or specific results.

run_id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline run.

reason.description: The reason why a human review is being requested.
